overseasJobs.name: Technical Artist Intern (Summer 2026)
overseasJobs.jd: Naughty Dog is looking for a Technical Artist Intern for Summer 2026. Responsibilities: assist the TA team with pipeline and tool development; learn about AAA game development workflows; participate in team meetings and contribute to projects. Requirements: currently enrolled in a relevant degree program; familiarity with Maya or similar DCC; basic scripting knowledge (Python preferred); passion for creating extraordinary game experiences.

overseasJobs.name: Technical Artist Intern
overseasJobs.jd: Epic Games is looking for a Technical Artist Intern for the Summer 2026 term. Responsibilities: assist the TA team with various pipeline tasks; learn about game development workflows; help test and document tools and processes. Requirements: currently enrolled in a relevant degree program (Computer Science, Game Development, Art); familiarity with at least one DCC tool (Maya, Blender, etc.); basic programming or scripting knowledge; passion for game development.

overseasJobs.name: Associate Technical Artist
overseasJobs.jd: Riot Games is looking for an Associate Technical Artist to join our team. Responsibilities: assist with asset pipeline tasks; learn and contribute to tool development; support artists with technical issues; participate in pipeline improvement projects. Requirements: 0-2 years of experience in technical art or game development; proficiency in at least one DCC tool (Maya, Blender, etc.); basic scripting knowledge; strong problem-solving skills; passion for games.

overseasJobs.name: Associate Technical Artist
overseasJobs.jd: Activision is looking for an Associate Technical Artist to join our team. Responsibilities: support art production with pipeline tasks; assist with tool development; help artists with technical issues; learn and grow within the TA team. Requirements: 0-2 years of experience; proficiency in Maya or similar DCC; basic scripting knowledge; strong desire to learn; passion for game development.

overseasJobs.name: UI Technical Artist
overseasJobs.jd: Activision is looking for a UI Technical Artist to support our UI/UX team. Responsibilities: create UI visual effects and transitions; develop UI tools and automation; optimize UI performance; collaborate with UI designers and engineers on UI implementation. Requirements: 2+ years of UI TA experience; proficiency in shader authoring for UI effects; experience with Unreal/Unity UI systems; good artistic sensibility; understanding of UI/UX best practices in games.

overseasJobs.name: 行业销售工程师（地产建筑）
Pipeline Technical Artist
overseasJobs.jd: PlayStation Studios is looking for a Pipeline Technical Artist to support our game development teams. Responsibilities: develop and maintain art production pipelines and tools; create Maya/Python scripts for workflow automation; integrate art assets into the game engine; collaborate with artists and programmers to improve production efficiency. Requirements: 2+ years of pipeline TA experience; expert Python and Maya MEL scripting; experience with Unreal/Unity engine pipelines; understanding of asset management systems; shipped a game or significant game project.

overseasJobs.name: Technical Artist — Rendering
overseasJobs.jd: The Technical Artist will support Meta's Reality Labs AR/VR rendering team. Responsibilities: develop and optimize shaders for AR/VR applications; research and implement advanced rendering techniques; collaborate with engineers to integrate art assets into real-time rendering pipelines; create technical documentation and art pipelines for AR/VR content. Requirements: strong knowledge of rendering pipelines and GPU architecture; proficiency in shader languages (HLSL, GLSL); experience with AR/VR rendering optimization; understanding of mobile GPU constraints. Note: This is a contractor role (W2) with potential conversion to full-time.

overseasJobs.name: Technical Artist — Character Animation
overseasJobs.jd: Bungie is looking for a Technical Artist to support our Character Animation team. Responsibilities: develop character rigging and deformation solutions; create Maya scripts and tools for animation workflows; optimize character performance in-game; collaborate with animators and engineers on character systems. Requirements: strong Maya rigging and skinning skills; proficiency in Python/MEL scripting; experience with game engine character import pipelines; understanding of animation systems and blend shapes; experience with Destiny or similar AAA character workflows preferred.

overseasJobs.name: Technical Artist — Vancouver
overseasJobs.jd: Ubisoft Vancouver is looking for a Technical Artist to join our team. Responsibilities: support art production pipelines; develop tools and scripts; integrate assets into the game engine; collaborate with artists and engineers. Requirements: 2+ years of technical art experience; proficiency in Maya and Python; experience with Unreal Engine; good understanding of game art pipelines; shipped at least one game title.

自动驾驶高级研发工程师/架构师/TLM

Associate Technical Artist, Characters
overseasJobs.jd: The Associate Technical Artist will work closely with the Character Art team to develop and maintain character asset pipelines. Responsibilities include creating and maintaining character rigs and deformation tools; troubleshooting character performance issues; collaborating with animators to ensure proper deformation and skin weighting; developing Maya scripts and tools to streamline character workflows. Requirements: Strong Maya and rigging knowledge; proficiency in Python/MEL scripting; experience with game engine character import pipelines; understanding of character deformation and skin weighting. This role is hybrid (3 days in-office) in South Salt Lake.

overseasJobs.name: Technical Artist — FX Pipeline
overseasJobs.jd: Bungie is looking for a Technical Artist to support our FX pipeline. Responsibilities: develop VFX pipeline tools and workflows; create shaders for VFX systems; optimize VFX performance in-game; collaborate with VFX artists and engineers. Requirements: 2+ years of VFX TA experience; strong shader authoring skills (HLSL/GLSL); experience with Niagara, Cascade, or similar VFX systems; proficiency in Python; understanding of real-time rendering optimization.

overseasJobs.name: Technical Artist — Shader & VFX
overseasJobs.jd: Riot Games is looking for a Technical Artist to join our shader and VFX team. Responsibilities: author and maintain shaders for League of Legends and other titles; develop VFX pipeline tools; collaborate with artists and engineers on visual effects implementation; research and prototype new rendering techniques. Requirements: strong HLSL/GLSL shader authoring skills; proficiency in Unreal Engine; experience with VFX tools (Niagara, Cascade); good understanding of real-time rendering pipelines; passion for games.

overseasJobs.name: Technical Artist — Environment
overseasJobs.jd: Insomniac Games is looking for a Technical Artist to support the Environment Art team. Responsibilities: develop environment art pipelines and tools; create procedural workflow solutions; optimize environment assets for real-time rendering; collaborate with environment artists to solve technical challenges. Requirements: 2+ years of environment TA experience; proficiency in Houdini and Python; experience with Unreal Engine environment tools; understanding of environment asset optimization; shipped at least one AAA title.

overseasJobs.name: Subject Matter Expert – VFX Artists (Remote - Los Angeles)
Technical Artist — Shader Development
overseasJobs.jd: Epic Games is looking for a Technical Artist specializing in shader development. Responsibilities: author and maintain shaders for Unreal Engine titles; develop shader tools and frameworks; collaborate with engineers on renderer features; create shader documentation and best practices. Requirements: strong HLSL/GLSL shader authoring skills; experience with Unreal Engine's material system; understanding of real-time rendering techniques; good communication skills; passion for pushing visual boundaries.

Responsibilities: design and implement art production pipelines; develop tools to improve artist productivity; maintain and optimize asset management systems; mentor junior pipeline TAs. overseasJobs.name: Senior Unreal Graphics Engineer – UE5 (Sports / Action / Simulation Games)
Senior Technical Artist, Environment
overseasJobs.jd: Naughty Dog is looking for a Senior Technical Artist to support the Environment Art team. Responsibilities: develop environment art pipelines and tools; create procedural workflow solutions using Houdini and Python; optimize environment assets for real-time rendering; collaborate with environment artists to solve complex technical challenges. Requirements: 5+ years of technical art experience in games; expert-level Houdini and Python; deep understanding of real-time environment rendering; experience with open-world game environments; shipped at least one AAA title.

overseasJobs.name: Senior Technical Artist — Rendering
overseasJobs.jd: Rockstar Games is looking for a Senior Technical Artist specializing in rendering. Responsibilities: lead rendering technology initiatives for upcoming titles; develop advanced shader solutions; optimize rendering performance across multiple platforms; collaborate with engineering on renderer architecture. Requirements: 5+ years of technical art experience with focus on rendering; expert-level HLSL/GLSL shader authoring; deep knowledge of console and PC rendering pipelines; experience with open-world rendering optimization; strong communication skills.

overseasJobs.name: Senior Technical Artist, Characters
overseasJobs.jd: Santa Monica Studio is looking for a Senior Technical Artist to support our Character Art team. Requirements: 5+ years of character TA experience; expert Maya rigging and skinning; strong Python scripting; experience with Unreal Engine character pipelines; shipped AAA character-heavy titles; excellent communication skills.
